content_fingerprint: llama cpp re enables fast fp16 gelu kernel for cpu backends the ggml org team has re enabled a fast half precision gelu approximation on cpu in llama cpp tightening inference performance on a widely used local model runner llama cpp has re enabled the fast gelu quick f16 kernel for the ggml cpu backend in release b8937 restoring an optimized path for half precision inference on cpu the change tracks pull request 22339 and was published on april 26 2026 the gelu gaussian error linear unit activation appears in many transformer architectures the gelu quick f16 approximation trades a small amount
